prestazioni: 2JZ-GTE engine with a fully built internals package featuring Manley forged 9.0:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 264°/264° camshaft profile for high-RPM power retention (1,000+ hp capable with supporting mods).
Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS and a GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler (800hp+ efficiency).

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with a custom 2JZ-GTE flex-fuel map (E85 compatible), dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, and ID1700x injectors for precise fueling at 40+ psi rail pressure (via Radium Engineering fuel surge tank).
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit (JDM-spec, carbon fiber fenders and overfenders) with custom matte gunmetal paint (PPG DBC basecoat) and a Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser (polyurethane, bolt-on).

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (2JZ-specific valving, 30-way adjustable damping) paired with Cusco Type RS 2-way adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) for chassis rigidity.

JSpec carbon fiber hood (Seibon, dry carbon, 50% weight reduction) with a custom NACA duct feeding the GReddy intercooler, and a custom rear wing (Tom’s Style-B, 3D-printed aluminum endplates) for 300+ lbs of downforce at 150 mph.
